items.title: Yalı Çapkını
items.overview: When Istanbul playboy Ferit Korhan's exasperated grandfather arranges his marriage to a girl from Gaziantep, fate intervenes — Ferit falls for Seyran, the younger sister of his intended bride, upending both families.

items.title: Kuruluş Osman
items.overview: The epic continuation of Diriliş Ertuğrul, Kuruluş Osman follows Osman Bey — son of Ertuğrul and destined founder of the Ottoman Empire — as he transforms a small Turkic tribe into a sovereign state. Battling the Byzantine Empire, Mongol forces and treachery from within, Osman must prove himself as

items.title: Eshref Ruya
items.overview: As a child, Eşref fell in love from afar with a girl he called “Rüya” and spent years searching for her, only to become a powerful mafia figure along the way. Meanwhile, Nisan, an idealistic musician, finds herself in grave danger after performing at a wedding held at Eşref’s hotel. Eşref falls for

items.title: Sins and Roses
items.overview: As a boy, Serhat lost both his father and fortune but built an empire on family and integrity. His world shatters when his wife Berrak hides a devastating secret and falls into a coma. While searching for answers, his heart hardens—until he meets Zeynep, a passionate florist chasing the same truth,

items.title: The Shadow Team
items.overview: A team of elite agents within Turkey's National Intelligence Organisation are recruited for covert operations — on the condition that the outside world believes they are dead. Led by veteran officer Mete Bey, the shadow team carries out high-stakes missions at home and abroad, battling terrorist net

items.title: The Promise
items.overview: Reyhan is a sweet, small-town girl who agrees to marry a wealthy Istanbul playboy named Emir — as a favour to his dying father. Emir's plan? items.title: Redemption
items.overview: Orhun is a successful businessman who was raised in a wealthy but loveless family along with his twin sister Nihan, younger sister Nurşah and their cold, distant mother Afife. Nihan left to do volunteer work as a doctor in Eritrea, but recently she has been impossible to contact, and her family is w

items.title: Torn Apart
items.overview: Aras, a fearless seventeen-year-old boy, comes to Bodrum to search for his younger sibling, the only remaining member of his family whom he lost at the age of five. His new life in Bodrum will turn into a challenging struggle when his path crosses with the Akkaya family, the most powerful family in

items.title: Another Self
items.overview: Three friends arrive in a seaside town, where they connect with their spiritual selves and suddenly face unresolved trauma from their families' pasts.

items.title: Far Away
items.overview: Alya Albora arrives in Mardin with her late husband’s funeral and their five-year-old son to fulfill her husband’s last will. items.title: Boundless Love
items.overview: When he was a little child, Halil İbrahim lost his father due to a blood feud and was exiled to Istanbul. items.title: Blood Flowers
items.overview: Dilan gave up all her dreams to marry Baran — a man from the family her family has been feuding with for years — to save her brother's life. items.title: Valley of Hearts
items.overview: Sumru left the children she gave birth to at a young age and built a new life and family for herself. items.title: Underground
items.overview: Haydar Ali avenges his family's murder and ends up in prison, where he falls into the orbit of Turkey's most dangerous crime cartel. items.title: Love Is in the Air
items.overview: Eda, who ties all her hopes to her education, confronts Serkan Bolat, who cuts off her international education scholarship and leaves her with high school diploma. Serkan Bolat offers Eda to give her scholarship back if she pretends to be his fiance for two months. Although Eda rejects the offer of

items.title: The Pit
items.overview: When a mafia family named Koçovars are in danger of losing control of their neighborhood, “The Pit,” their youngest son must come back home, a place he could never truly escape.

items.title: Cranberry Sorbet
items.overview: When free-spirited Doğa falls head over heels for charming Fatih, nobody expects the chaos that follows. items.title: Wild heart
items.overview: A young boy abducted from a wealthy family grows up on the streets, forming a tight bond with other street children as he survives hardship and violence. items.title: A Woman Scorned
items.overview: Asya is a successful doctor and she has a perfect life with her husband and her son. But after finding a blonde hair on her husband's scarf, everything changes and she discovers her husband's extramarital affair.

items.title: Elif
items.overview: A kind 6-year-old girl is placed under the protection of her mother's best friend, who keeps a well-hidden secret, and is a maid for a wealthy family, in whose mansion she lives.

items.title: Deep In Love
items.overview: In a land where people are accustomed to battling fierce waves and constant storms, the story of a woman who stands tall on her feet, with all her emotional strength, resilience and endurance, and a man who is passionate about his "love" and who competes with the storms of the Black Sea and struggle

items.title: Mehmed: Sultan of Conquests
items.overview: The epic story of Mehmed II — the young Ottoman prince who defied palace enemies, survived treachery and deposition, and returned to fulfil his life's dream: the conquest of Constantinople. items.title: My Siblings
items.overview: Kardeşlerim follows four orphaned siblings struggling to survive after losing their parents. items.title: Family Secrets
items.overview: Ceylin is a fierce, rule-bending defence attorney whose father was wrongly imprisoned — for her, justice always comes before the law. items.title: The Magnificent Century
items.overview: At the age of 26, when his reign began, Sultan Süleyman sought to build an empire more powerful than Alexander the Great and to render the Ottomans invincible. items.title: 6 of Us
items.overview: A story of six siblings—Azize, Cemo, Zeliha, Fidan, Samet, and Balım—who, after suddenly losing their parents, struggle to stay united and survive. items.title: The Town Doctor
items.overview: Medical drama series, local adaptation of the Korean scripted format “Dr. Romantic”, centering on a genius doctor with an accomplished career who somehow ends up leaving it all behind to be a neighborhood doctor in a small town where he meets some younger doctors and becomes a mentor to them.

items.title: Leyla
items.overview: As a child, Leyla suffers a blow from her stepmother and sees her world turned upside down. She loses everything - except the thirst for revenge. items.title: The Law of Nature
items.overview: Yaman and Doğa’s paths cross once again, years after a disastrous first encounter during a job interview. As two strong-willed people from completely different worlds, their initial clash gradually turns into an inevitable connection as fate begins to reshape both of their lives.

items.title: Valley of the Wolves: Ambush
items.overview: A continuation series of Osman Sinav's The Wolves Of The Valley. This produce focuses on politics, National Security and Regional Middle East problems. The Wolves of The Valley: Ambush serie also attracts attention by two film; The Wolves of The Valley: Iraq and The Wolves of The Valley: Palestine.

items.title: Bride of Istanbul
items.overview: Faruk is the owner of a bus company and the leader of a powerful family in Bursa which is a metropol in Turkey. Faruk meets a violonist girl and falls in love with her. But the dominant mother of Faruk isn't happy with her son's relationship.

items.title: Poyraz Karayel
items.overview: A defamed ex-cop, who is struggling to get back his son, is put on undercover duty within the biggest mafia in Istanbul.

items.title: Mucize Doktor
items.overview: Mucize Doktor / A Miracle (2019) is a Turkish FOX medical drama (64 episodes) starring Taner Ölmez, adapted from the Korean series Good Doctor. items.title: The One I Love
items.overview: Erkan Aldur, a young man from a wealthy Istanbul family, is stationed in eastern Turkey to complete his mandatory military service in a remote, earthquake-stricken region. items.title: Mother
items.overview: Anne (Mother), a 2016–2017 Turkish drama, follows Zeynep, a substitute teacher who discovers her 7-year-old student, Melek, is being severely abused and neglected by her mother, Sule. items.title: Endless Love
items.overview: Two separate worlds lie on two sides of the road in a seaside town. Both too close and way too far from each other. What happens when two young people from these worlds fall in love?  Kemal is one of the three children of a moderate family that lives in one of the inner neighborhoods of the town. Hi

items.title: Back Streets
items.overview: The series tells the story of the family lives of the police officers working in a special team of the Istanbul Police Department's Public Security Department and their adventures on the streets of Istanbul. The team encounters different and diverse human stories during their missions. The Istanbul

items.title: Another Chance
items.overview: Deniz, an ambitious and level-headed investment advisor rising in the finance sector, finds himself torn between a dazzling career and love. items.title: Valley of the Wolves
items.overview: One of Turkey's most iconic and influential dramas, Valley of the Wolves follows Polat Alemdar, an undercover agent who infiltrates Istanbul's most dangerous crime organisation after years of preparation. items.title: Arafta
items.overview: Ateş, a man haunted by childhood scars and consumed by rage, returns to destroy the family that shattered his life years ago. items.title: Sıfır Bir
items.overview: The story of a group of young people who live in Adana – Hürriyet District got involved in illegal businesses and became Adana's strongest gang over time. items.title: Can Bagi
items.overview: A mother and businessman discover their daughters were switched at birth. To save one child's life through stem cell donation, they agree to a marriage of convenience, but their arrangement leads to unexpected feelings.

items.title: Power of Love
items.overview: A group of competitive women and men come together in The Power of Love to find their dream partner. Every week, some contestants win the weekly prize, while others say goodbye to their dreams of love and the house. Emotional moments, surprises, and exciting challenges await in this thrilling season

items.title: Mahsun J
items.overview: Mahsun is a motorcycle courier in Istanbul. While searching for a way out of his life filled with debt, he accidentally discovers his "greatest" talent and decides to become a GIGOLO. Her manager will be her friend Leyla, who is a failed advertising executive.

items.title: Possible Love
items.overview: Defne, a woman in her thirties, is strong and composed, having built her career through hard work. items.title: Özcan Show
items.overview: Turkey's only animated cartoon aimed at adults Ozcan Show, each week a different topic is discussed with the unique fun style. Ozcan Show keeps the pulse of the agenda, magazine, sports and television world.
